username.label: AniDB Username
username.description: Your AniDB account username (NOT the API password). Registration is free.

api_key.label: AniDB UDP API Key
api_key.description: The UDP "API Key" (a.k.a. API password) you set in your AniDB profile under Settings → Account → API. This is SEPARATE from your website login password.

use_title_dump.label: Use AniDB Title Dump
use_title_dump.description: Download the daily anime titles dump for fast, offline search. Recommended — it greatly reduces rate-limited API calls.

title_dump_url.label: Title Dump URL
title_dump_url.description: Source URL for the anime-titles.dat.gz file. Optional — change only if using a mirror.
